Glencore Investment

Get An Account

Setup a FREE account in minutes & get started earning your passive Bitcoin Income.

Deposit & Earn

Once your deposit is active, our traders and automated system will go to work for you.

Withdraw

All payout requests are handled instantly and automatically by our system.

Frequently questions

  • What do I need to start trading?

    You must have a bitcoin address for the start of trading. If you have not a bitcoin address then you can create your wallet account from the blockchain.com.

  • How secure is my cryptocurrency trading?

    Our system is transparent, solid and reliable. We have traded and earned Investors profit over the years and have hence gained credibility.

  • When do we close?

    You can trade at anytime of the day, month or year. We are also always available to answer your questions as neccessary.

  • What if I decide to stop trading with you

    No problems. We would ask a few questions, provide you your full entitlements and let you be on your way.

  • How can i get the price idea?

    Our Packages is stated clearly on the website. Surf through to get appropriate information.

  • How can I contact you?

    You can contact us by clicking the 'contact' button anywhere on the website.

Who we are?

Founded in June of 2016, Glencoreminers's longevity and success is due to a relentless pursuit of accuracy, depth and innovation, enhanced by the wisdom of past experience and a solid grasp on the future ahead. More than its individual brands.

Glencoreminers

Why Choose Glencoreminers

24/7 Support

Glencoreminers call center staff and customer service managers are ready to answer any questions from Investors around the clock � after all, we work with Investors from all over the globe.

Better Profits

Glencoreminers offers the most favorable cryptocurrency trading terms with regard to the income level and risk minimization, guaranteeing really significant profits.

Security

Glencoreminers goal is to secure the Investors� funds at the highest level, it is the same as keeping your funds in a bank. The system will allow a user to operate with the account only after authorization.

Speed

The system enables quick actions. When you ask for withdrawal of funds, it is performed instantly & does not involve any human interference.

We are ready to fly with you.

Our Mission is to service our customers by creating and delivering quality service, which is unique, valuable and profitable to help our clients attain financial success by providing real cryptocurrency trading opportunities and support.
